app.name: DELFluent
app.footer: DELFluent © {{year}} · DELF B2 Practice Platform · All questions are original simulations

landing.title: DELF B2 Exam Practice Platform
landing.subtitle: Systematic practice for Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking · AI correction · Real exam simulation

co.title: Listening
co.desc: Full audio tracks simulating real exam conditions

ce.title: Reading
ce.desc: Argumentative long-form texts with answer locations

po.title: Speaking
po.desc: Recording practice with AI examiner (AI plan)

landing.mockDesc: Simulate the real exam: listening, reading, writing, speaking in sequence

auth.passwordHint: At least 10 characters, mix of upper/lower/digit/symbol
auth.useAdminLogin: Admin accounts must sign in via the admin console

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send a reset link
forgot.sentDesc: If this email is registered, a reset link has been sent. It will expire in 30 minutes.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: At least 10 characters; include at least 3 of lower/upper/digit/symbol
reset.success: Password reset. Please sign in with your new password.
reset.fail: Reset failed — link may have expired

verify.successDesc: Your account is active. You can now sign in.
verify.expiredDesc: The verification link is no longer valid. Please request a new one after signing in.
verify.invalidDesc: We couldn't recognize this verification link.
verify.requiredDesc: We sent a verification email to {{email}}. Click the link inside to activate your account, or press the button below to resend.

sent.title: Verification email sent
sent.desc: We've sent a verification email to {{email}}.
sent.hint: Click the link within 24 hours to activate your account. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
sent.resendFail: Failed to resend, please try later

practice.title: Practice Library
practice.subtitle: Choose a set to begin. Free users can try sets marked 'Free preview'.

hub.title: Choose practice mode
hub.subtitle: Practice each skill on its own, or take a full mock exam.
hub.mockDesc: All 4 skills in sequence · Full exam flow

po.comingSoonDesc: Speaking recording & AI scoring are in development and planned for v2.0. In the meantime, prepare via listening, reading and writing.
po.bullet2: AI scoring of pronunciation, fluency, grammar (AI plan)
po.bullet3: Aligned with the official B2 examiner grid

exam.audioNotSupported: Your browser does not support audio playback
exam.essayPlaceholder: Write your essay here (250 words minimum)...
exam.essayAITip: 💡 Writing is not auto-graded in MVP. Upgrade to AI plan for AI correction.
exam.unsupported: This question type requires recording (coming soon)
exam.fiveMinWarning: ⏰ 5 minutes remaining — please finalize your answers.
exam.timeUp: Time is up — submitting your answers automatically.
exam.autoSubmitted: Your exam was auto-submitted because time expired.
exam.passPerSkill: Each of the 4 sections must score ≥ {{min}}/{{max}}

review.title: Results
review.noResult: No results found. Return to practice and try again.

mistakes.title: Mistake Notebook
mistakes.infoDesc: Questions you answered incorrectly are collected here. Re-practice them — once you answer correctly, they are automatically removed.
mistakes.empty: No mistakes yet — keep practising and any wrong answers will appear here.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: WeChat Pay / Alipay · Cancel anytime · 7-day refund
pricing.paymentNote: 💳 Payment integration will be activated after MVP launch (WeChat Pay / Alipay / Stripe)

grade.title: AI essay grade
grade.tooShort: Essay is too short ({{count}} words) — minimum {{min}} words required
grade.planRequired: Upgrade to Standard or higher to unlock AI grading
grade.quotaExceeded: You've used all AI gradings for this month
grade.pollingHint: This page refreshes automatically once grading completes.
grade.empty: No essay submitted for this question.
grade.slowWarning: AI grading is taking longer than usual — Claude may be busy. You can keep waiting or click Rewrite to retry.
grade.errNotConfigured: AI grading is not configured. Please contact the administrator.
grade.errTruncated: AI output was truncated. Please re-grade or try again later.
grade.errBadOutput: AI returned malformed output. Please re-grade.
grade.errProviderDown: Claude service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
grade.errRateLimited: Too many requests — please wait a moment and try again.
grade.errBadRequest: Grading request was rejected. Please contact the administrator.
grade.errCallFailed: Network or connection issue. Please retry.
grade.errTimeout: Grading timed out (>25s). Please re-grade or edit and resubmit.

model.pickerSubtitle: Higher tier = more accurate, also more expensive. You can re-grade later.
